creator: xelah-freebsd-pr@xelah.com
text:
On Thu, 29 Jan 2009, Robert Noland wrote:

> Please try with the latest xf86-input-mouse 1.4.0_1.
>
> robert.

I've run cvsup and portupgrade. It's no different, except (unless my 
memory is faulty) holding a key down while it's stopped no longer queues 
the auto-repeats.

   Alex
